creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
distinfo is missing checksum for the i386 arch

How-To-Repeat: 
fetch port at i386 and you fail with this err msg.

# make fetch
=> tw_cli-freebsd-x86-9.5.2.tgz is not in /usr/ports/sysutils/tw_cli/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/sysutils/tw_cli/distinfo is out of date, or
=> tw_cli-freebsd-x86-9.5.2.tgz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/tw_cli.
